allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\nodejs", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvm", "C:\\nvm", "C:\\nodejs"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p"; Get-ChildItem $p | Select-Object -First 5 Name } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $result = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3000/api/debug-jobs?q=%E0%B8%A1%E0%B8%B5%E0%B8%95%E0%B8%B3%E0%B9%81%E0%B8%AB%E0%B8%99%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%87%E0%B8%AD%E0%B8%B0%E0%B9%84%E0%B8%A3%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%9B%E0%B8%B4%E0%B8%94%E0%B8%A3%E0%B8%B1%E0%B8%9A%E0%B8%AA%E0%B8%A1%E0%B8%B1%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%A3%E0%B8%9A%E0%B9%89%E0%B8%B2%E0%B8%87"; Write-Output "total=$\($result.total\) matched=$\($result.matched\)"; $result.jobs | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$\($_.id\) | $\($_.branch\) | $\($_.status\)" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\PC\\OneDrive - Rocksgroup\\line oa chatbot" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Substring\("c:\\Users\\PC\\OneDrive - Rocksgroup\\line oa chatbot".Length\).TrimStart\('\\'\) })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\PC\\OneDrive - Rocksgroup\\line oa chatbot" -Force | Where-Object { $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\PC\\OneDrive - Rocksgroup\\line oa chatbot" -Force | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\PC\\OneDrive - Rocksgroup\\line oa chatbot\\app" -Recurse | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.Substring\("c:\\Users\\PC\\OneDrive - Rocksgroup\\line oa chatbot\\".Length\) })
